title: FRM Widget Type (Entity)
text: FRM Widget Type (Entity) Widget used to represent the entity occurrences in the component. Valid values are OCCLIST and Grid . Value Description OCCLIST Display the entity as a list of occurrences. Grid Use the Grid widget. Each field represents a column in the grid and occurrences are represented as rows. The grid widget provides extended triggers that enable you to sort columns and resize the grid. Note: The grid widget is not suitable for extremely large numbers of rows or columns, for example more than 60,000-120,000 cells. Applies To Entity Related Links egrid (Grid) The egrid widget displays data in a tabular format, in which the rows are occurrences of an entity and the columns are fields. It is an entity-level widget that is only applicable to form components. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
